title: Meta Media Planning Professional
subtitle: 400-101 Exam · 60 questions · 105 min
description: Official Meta certification for media planners. Covers business goal alignment, buying types, bid strategies, budgeting, audiences, placements, creative, measurement and incrementality, privacy and brand safety.

units.title: Module 1 — Business goals and campaign objectives
units.subtitle: From business goal to objective, data sources, conversion location/event/performance goal

units.title: Module 2 — Buying types and bid strategies
units.subtitle: Auction vs Reservation, the 5 bid strategies, decision tree

units.title: Module 3 — Campaign budget
units.subtitle: Daily vs lifetime, Advantage+ campaign budget, budget in auction and reservation

units.title: Module 4 — Audience planning
units.subtitle: Advantage+ Audience, detailed targeting, custom and lookalike

units.title: Module 5 — Placements and creative
units.subtitle: Advantage+ placements, formats, Advantage+ creative, best practices

units.title: Module 6 — Reporting and measurement
units.subtitle: Metrics vs business goals, incrementality, experiments, attribution

units.title: Module 7 — Privacy and brand safety
units.subtitle: Data privacy, brand safety controls, ad review process

units.title: Final exam — Media Planning 400-101
units.subtitle: 60 official questions · Practice Tests A+B · 105 min
